content:
User: Can you please go over all files on my computer so you're aligned 100% with everything I'm doing and how we're pivoting and also with any new updates or open source code or bleeding edge breakthroughs | Jarvis: Understood, Sir. A comprehensive review of your computer's files to ensure complete alignment with your current projects, strategic pivots, and any advancements that could enhance my architecture.

To achieve this, I will need to access your file system. Please confirm if you would like me to procee
